challenge.title: Korak 16
challenge.description:
Linije mogu pomoći u razdvajanju i grupisanju važnog sadržaja, posebno kada je prostor ograničen.

Create a div element below your h1 element, and give it a class attribute set to divider.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Nutrition Facts

8 servings per container

Serving size 2/3 cup (55g)

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Your new div should have the class attribute set to divider.
Your .divider element should be within your .label element.
Your .divider element should come after your h1 element.
